items.caption: A collage with a wooden background featuring text and artwork. the text is in a serif font and reads "diego rivera ~ mexico" with bullet points stating "used art to educate" and "most famous mural is in detroit, michigan." below the text, there is a photograph of diego rivera, a man with a mustache, wearing a dark shirt. to the right of the text, there is a stylized image of a factory with multiple levels and machinery, depicted in a monochromatic color scheme. the artwork is detailed, showing various mechanical components and workers in the factory. the style of the image is informative, likely intended to provide a brief overview of diego rivera's artistic contributions and his most renowned work.
